title: mutisia spinosa
intro: Mutisia spinosa, also known as the spiny mutisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is native to the Andean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mutisia spinosa include relief from rheumatism, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a treatment for respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Mutisia spinosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
